content.en:
"The Void Source Body created by other Void Children should be far less powerful and perfect than my Void Source Body, so once I condense the Endless Source Body, its strength will be even stronger, and there is even a real hope of passing through the second layer of the Void Source Tower!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The Endless Source Body was created, and Ye Tian was ready to start cultivating.

However, if you want to really condense the Endless Source Body, you need some material resources to assist, and other ordinary materials are just that, but there are two materials that must be available.

The first main material is the Void Source Crystal, this treasure is very precious, even in the Void Source Palace, it is worth 100 points.

In the 22 Great Tribulations that Ye Tian had searched for various talents before, Ye Tian was lucky enough to encounter a Void Source Crystal, and it took several lives to obtain this Void Source Crystal.

It was precisely with this Void Source Crystal that he would add the characteristics of the Void Source Crystal to it when he perfected the Endless Source Body, so that he could completely perfect the Endless Source Body.

The second main material is the Eternal Source Thing, the special energy possessed by the Eternal Source is the most critical thing that the Endless Source Body has cultivated, if there is no Eternal Source Thing, the Endless Source Body cannot be formed.

In fact, the Void Source Tablet can also be called an Eternal Source Object, and it is enough to rank among the Eternal Source Things, but unfortunately he can't extract the energy of the Void Source Tablet, otherwise the Void Source Palace's machine spirits will suppress him.

But he still has a mountain of void gold, so there is no shortage of eternal sources.

After preparing other auxiliary materials, Ye Tian began to retreat and cultivate the Endless Source Body on the Void Mi Golden Mountain.

After a long time, Ye Tian's cultivation reached a critical moment, he took out the Void Source Crystal, began to refine the Void Source Crystal, and also began to extract the energy of the Void Golden Mountain.

At this time, Ye Tian's Invincible Body, the Infinite Source Body, began to disintegrate, and gradually evolved into an Endless Source Body.

At the beginning, Ye Tian was very weak, but as time passed, his invincible body became more and more terrifying, and he soon surpassed the Wanyuan Guiru.

A dark calendar!

A great catastrophe!

Unconsciously, Ye Tian had been in retreat for six Great Tribulation Periods, and at this moment, he had completely condensed the Endless Source Body, the Void Source Body, and the power of the invincible Void Source Body far exceeded that of the Ten Thousand Sources Ruins.

But.

"It's too expensive!"

Ye Tian looked at the Void Golden Mountain below, it had become dim at the moment, he had absorbed too much energy, even if he had repaired the rules of the Heavenly Objects at the beginning, it was far less than this time.

He felt that he had almost sucked this Void Gold Mountain to the ground, and relying on the Void Gold Mountain like this now, I was afraid that it would not be enough for him to be promoted to an invincible person.

If it was before, he might have felt pity, but now he doesn't care.

He is not only a Void Child, maybe he can also be promoted to a Void God Son, and he has condensed the Endless Source Body, how terrifying the future potential is, and he doesn't care about a mere Void Gold Mountain.

The Void Gold Mountain is only ranked among the more than a hundred Eternal Source Things, and he is still a little unsightly.

The Void Mi Gold Mountain has created his endless source body, and he has done his duty.

After forming the Endless Source Body, Ye Tian began to stabilize the Endless Source Body, and at the same time, he needed to re-cultivate to the consummation realm of the Endless Source Body before he could impact the second-rank invincible realm.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to cultivate, and finally spent a few more Great Tribulation Chronicles and countless resources to cultivate the Endless Source Body to the consummation realm of a third-class invincible.

Not only that, Ye Tian also perfected many of his invincible ancestral skills again.

The Invincible Ancestral Technique he created before was indeed a top-notch Invincible Skill, but it was not the top-notch Invincible Skill, and there were even shortcomings.

Now, he has perfected these invincible ancestral skills, which is enough to increase the power of these invincible skills by more than fifty percent, and the consumption can also be reduced by less than three percent.

In this way, his overall strength has also improved a lot.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Void Tower of the Void Source Palace, he was ready to pass through the second layer of the Void Tower, if he succeeded, he would be the Void Divine Son, and his status was far beyond that of the ordinary Void Son.

The second floor of the Void Tower.

Ye Tian watched the countless robberies around him rush over, and immediately fought with these robbers.

If it had been before, he would not have been able to kill a single beast with a single blow, and he would not have been able to compete with these countless beasts at all.

But now it's different, he can kill a piece of robber beasts with one hand, and his combat effectiveness has increased by many times.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's consumption was not light, and he was also injured, but the number of robberies decreased rapidly.

Under such circumstances, he had great hope of passing through the second floor of the Void Tower.

After a long time, Ye Tian's injuries were already serious, but there were not many robberies left, and after a few days of fighting, Ye Tian finally killed all these beasts, and he himself was extremely miserable.

If he hadn't perfected those invincible ancestral skills, he was afraid that he would fail this time.

"Ye Tian passed through the second layer of the Void Tower and officially became the Void God Son of the Void Source Palace, did he pass all the Void Sons?"

The voice of the machine spirit came.

"No!"

Ye Tian immediately refused.

He didn't want to be too high-profile now, he was only a third-class invincible now, and any first-class invincible had the strength to kill him, let alone those supreme.

If he is too high-profile, if some Supreme Beings don't want him to grow up, he will be in some trouble, even if the main body can hide in the foreign world for the time being, but once he becomes a second-class invincible, there is no way to hide in the foreign world, and the Supreme One can pinch him to death with only one hand.

So, it's better to keep a low profile for the time being!

After breaking through the second layer of the Void Tower, Ye Tian did not continue to break through the third layer.

After all, he even paid the price of serious injuries even when he broke through the second layer, and there was no hope of breaking through the third layer at all.

After coming out of the Void Tower, Ye Tian began to check the permissions and rewards that belonged to the Void Divine Son.

The Void Source Hall gave three major rewards.

The first reward is 10,000 points, after all, he will be rewarded with 30,000 points if he passes the second layer of the Void Tower, and breaking through the second layer of the Void Tower is synchronized with becoming the Void Godson, so he can continue to be rewarded with 10,000 points, which is already very good.

The second reward is a source weapon, which is a weapon that is superior to a hijacking weapon, and almost only the supreme has the financial resources to build one.

And Ye Tian, as a third-class invincible, had a source weapon, which was enough to make countless invincibles envious.

The third reward is an Eternal Source!

That's right, it's the Eternal Source Thing, and such a precious thing is actually one of the rewards for becoming a Void God Son.

Of course, the eternal source of giving is not too precious, but the value is unimaginable!

In addition to these three major rewards, Ye Tian also has several permissions.

First, he can check the basic information of any Void Child; second, he can comprehend the Void Source Tablet without queuing, and only need 250 points for each Enlightenment, which is half the points of other Void Sons; third, he can have the blessing of mobilizing the Void Source Palace's origin power three times, if he is attacked by an invincible person in the outside world, he can save his life, so that he has enough time to return to the Void Source Palace, which is equivalent to three chances to save his life; fourth, he has an independent cultivation space in the Void Source Palace, where cultivation will be very safe, if Ye Tian becomes a second-class invincible in the future, he will not be able to reside in the foreign world, you can practice in the cultivation space of the Void Source Palace.

Seeing these rewards and permissions, Ye Tian was extremely excited.

"Becoming a Void God Son, there are really too many benefits!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.
